response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance song as 'Akuma no Odorikata' by Tatsuya Kitani, with Nekomata Okayu as the performer, based on on-screen text. 2. Performed a search for the lyrics of 'Akuma no Odorikata' by Tatsuya Kitani. 3. Retrieved the full original Japanese lyrics and an English translation. 4. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-04:02 is the music performance, and 04:02-04:17 is the post-performance talk. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the complete lyrics and scene details.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live stage performance of the song 'Akuma no Odorikata' (Devil's Manner) by the VTuber Nekomata Okayu, followed by a brief post-performance greeting.

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu performs 'Akuma no Odorikata' on a concert stage, dancing and singing throughout. Visual effects and concert lighting accompany the performance. The song ends at 04:02.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 感情なんてもんはどうしても無駄だって悪魔は言った 「何もかも捨てちまえよ」 嗚呼、快不快も、喜怒哀楽さえも！ どうしようもない事実、ヒトは終焉から逃れられない 「誰も抗えない欲望に従え」 思考を休めるな 脳ミソを回せ 「誰もお前のことなど見ちゃいないさ」 おかしくなってしまうことをどうして恥じる？ お前らに完璧で間違った踊り方を教えてやるから いっせーので捨てちまえ、そんな命ならば 何十何百何千何万回学習しなさいな どうしたってさ、空っぽの頭蓋骨だろ わかっているのかい？ 感情なんていつ何時でも邪魔だって悪魔は言った 「反論の余地などない」 嗚呼、人生に意味を与えておくれ！ 420でさえも救えない終焉があると知った 「誰も疑わない神様を疑え」 思考を休めるな 脳ミソを回せ 「誰もお前のことなど見ちゃいないさ」 躊躇っている数秒の無益さを知れ お前らに完璧で間違った踊り方を教えてやるから いっせーので捨てちまえ、そんな命ならば 何十何百何千何万回学習しなさいな どうしたってさ、頭ん中空っぽなこと わかっていないようだ 承認欲にレイプされ、死んだ花をぶら下げている女 何かを愛すことすら、ままならないまま餌を待つだけ 踊り方を知らない、芸術の価値などわからないやつらに 堕落していれば 何も見えないまま 真善美に背いた踊り方を教えてやるから いっせーので狂っちまえ、惨めな姿で 何十何百何千何万何億人の中でさぁ、 そうして埋もれていたっていいと どうして言えるのだろう？ ねぇ、世界が患っている狂信は 健常者でさえ目が眩むような光を放っている 今夜、悪魔がお前らにこう云うぜ 「神とやらに惑わされるなよ」
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: "Things like emotions are useless no matter what", so said the devil. \"Just throw away everything!\" Ah, pleasure and displeasure, even your human emotions! It's an inescapable truth, humans can't run away from their demise. \"Obey the desires that no one can resist\". Don't rest your mind, put those brains to action. \"No one is watching you or anything...\" Why are you embarrassed of becoming a bit strange? I'll teach you all a perfect but mistaken way to dance. So if it's that kind of life, throw it away on \"Ready, set, go!\" Learn it tens, hundreds, thousands, millions of times. At any rate, your skull is empty. You understand that, right? \"Emotions are a nuisance every moment of your life\", so said the devil. \"There's no room for objections\". Ah, grant meaning upon this human life! I knew that there's a demise that not even 420 could save me from. \"Doubt the god that no one else questions\". Don't rest your mind, put those brains to action. \"No one is watching you or anything...\" Know of the futility of your few seconds of hesitation. I'll teach you all a perfect but mistaken way to dance. So if it's that kind of life, throw it away on \"Ready, set, go!\" Learn it tens, hundreds, thousands, millions of times. At any rate, the inside of your head is empty. And it seems you don't understand that. A woman, hanging up dead flowers, raped by her want of recognition. Without even having anything to love, she waits for her feed without having her way. For those that don't know how to dance, that don't understand the value of art, they should fall into depravity without ever having truly seen. I'll teach you a dance that goes against all that is good. So in your miserable state, just go mad on \"Ready, set, go!\" In the midst of those tens, hundreds, thousands, millions of people, why can you say that you were fine with being buried in them that way? Listen, the fanaticism that this world is afflicted with lets out a light that makes even a healthy person dizzy. Tonight, the devil will speak to you as such: \"Don't let yourself be led astray by some god\".

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu addresses the audience with a post-performance greeting and comments on the song.
